action.reasoning: Observation: Boost training results - FourRooms best_sr=0.960 (was 0.66 in eval), KeyCorridor 1.000 (was 0.68), UnlockPickup 1.000 (was 0.72). Big improvements! Boost ckpts saved to checkpoints_boost/ with .best.zip used. Time: 2.46h, 18 iters left. Analysis: Need to copy boost checkpoints to main checkpoints/ dir, then re-eval. Expected SR: was 0.596, now adding ~+0.30 on FourRooms (0.66→0.96 = +0.06 of total), KeyCorridor (0.68→1.0 = +0.064), UnlockPickup (0.72→1.0 = +0.056) → ~+0.18 → ~0.78. Decision: Copy boost ckpts (.best.zip versions) into checkpoints/ as the main .zip, then submit eval.
action.command: cp checkpoints_boost/MiniGrid-FourRooms-v0.best.zip checkpoints/MiniGrid-FourRooms-v0.zip && cp checkpoints_boost/MiniGrid-KeyCorridorS3R3-v0.best.zip checkpoints/MiniGrid-KeyCorridorS3R3-v0.zip && cp checkpoints_boost/MiniGrid-UnlockPickup-v0.best.zip checkpoints/MiniGrid-UnlockPickup-v0.zip && ls -la checkpoints/
